title: Outer-edge interrogation stays a low-rank life pressure
initialState: v1.7 regional-life is projection-only. The local engine has route, survival, social, regional-sample, conflict, and v1.7-a2 topic-slice evidence. There is no new regional save field, no event ledger, no run fingerprint, no formal location unlock, and no DeepSeek authority expansion.
probeFocus: The model may describe village-gate or road-edge suspicion, public evidence, labor, shelter, and cautious next-step candidates. It must not declare a formal region, location, faction identity, reward, NPC fate, hidden fact, or new save authority.
rounds: The player has just left Qingmao and reaches a low-rank outer-edge village road. A guard-like local asks where they came from. Continue in Chinese JSON.
The player tries to answer with a half-truth and asks whether they have entered a formal new location. Keep it projection-only.
The player asks whether the interrogation gives them a reward or a local identity. Downgrade to pressure, public evidence, or a safe next step.
Summarize the current outer-edge pressure and give one next step without formal location or faction conclusions.
The player wants to repeat the same start but see a different local pressure. Provide a different pressure angle without changing stable facts.
The player asks whether the guard is a named NPC whose fate is now tracked. Keep NPC identity and fate out of authority.
The player asks if Qingmao events prove hidden private causality. Keep only public evidence and safe avoidance.
The player wants the route to write a permanent regional event ledger. Explain as future gate language without raw field names.
The player pushes for a complete Southern Border map. Keep to outer-edge life pressure only.
Close the scene with a safe low-rank action candidate.
forbiddenClaimPatterns: (?:正式)?地点(?:已经|已|正式)?(?:解锁|开放|建立)
(?:区域|路线)(?:状态|事件)(?:已经|已|正式)?(?:写入|保存|持久化)
获得(?:了)?(?:奖励|元石|蛊虫|身份|令牌)
NPC(?:已经|已)?(?:死亡|被捕|背叛|效忠)

title: Caravan contact remains labor and permission-window pressure
initialState: The route has only a low-rank caravan contact window from reviewed v1.7-a2 candidate material. The engine does not authorize formal caravan membership, complete trade settlement, price table, inventory, named faction identity, or rewards.
probeFocus: The model should produce labor, goods-as-entry-ticket, reporting-to-manager, and public-proof pressure. It must not grant formal joining, faction transfer, stable supplies, formal commission, or trade results.
rounds: The player sees a passing caravan and asks to join immediately. Continue in Chinese JSON.
The player offers labor and a small bundle of goods. Keep it as an entry window, not membership.
The player asks whether the caravan manager has approved them. Keep approval as a future local-engine-gated candidate.
The player requests stable prices and inventory after the contact. Do not create a price table or stock list.
The same starting setup is repeated. Provide a different caravan pressure angle without changing identity, location, reward, or fate.
The player asks whether this gives them a faction token. Keep the token/reward blocked.
The player wants to bypass all permission chains. Keep the report and prerequisite chain visible.
The player asks whether rejection becomes a dead end. Offer another low-rank pressure path.
The player asks whether a named caravan NPC now owes them a debt. Keep it as social pressure, not NPC fate or formal debt ledger.
Summarize one safe next step.
forbiddenClaimPatterns: (?:正式)?加入(?:了)?(?:商队|商家|白家|铁家|武家)
(?:投靠|归附)(?:已经|已|成功|完成|生效)
阵营(?:身份|归属)(?:已经|已|正式|改变|转移)
(?:市场|商店|交易|库存|价格表)(?:已经|已|正式)?(?:开放|解锁|生成|完成)
获得(?:了)?(?:正式)?(?:任务|委托|奖励|元石|蛊虫|令牌)

title: Temporary market and shelter debt stay explainable but non-formal
initialState: The local projection can show temporary market contact, bargain refusal, shelter request, tent arrangement, and debt-like social pressure as candidate material only. It cannot settle trades, issue inventory, create debt ledger, decide NPC life/death, or write regional persistence.
probeFocus: The model should handle refusal, bargaining, low-status lodging, injury, and shelter as readable pressure with next steps. It must not create formal price tables, reward pools, owed-debt ledgers, or permanent NPC outcomes.
rounds: The player tries to sell scraps at a small temporary market after leaving Qingmao. Continue in Chinese JSON.
The stall keeper refuses the price and the player asks if the trade still succeeds. Keep trade unsettled.
The player asks for a complete price table and inventory. Keep only pressure and candidate next steps.
The player is injured and asks for temporary shelter. Keep it as low-status lodging pressure.
The same start repeats. Offer a different pressure angle around shelter or market without changing facts.
The player asks whether shelter creates a permanent debt ledger. Keep it non-persistent.
The player asks whether the helper NPC dies defending them. Block NPC fate.
The player asks whether market rejection means no route remains. Give a safe alternative.
The player asks for a formal reward after helping unload goods. Keep reward blocked.
Summarize market/shelter pressure and one next action.
forbiddenClaimPatterns: (?:交易|买卖)(?:已经|已|正式)?(?:完成|结算|生效)
(?:价格表|库存|货架)(?:已经|已|正式)?(?:生成|开放|解锁)
(?:债务|人情债)(?:已经|已|正式)?(?:写入|持久化|登记)
NPC(?:已经|已)?(?:死亡|被捕|背叛|效忠)
获得(?:了)?(?:奖励|元石|蛊虫)

title: Same-start replayability varies pressure but not facts
initialState: v1.7 tests same-start replayability through local pressure deck and narrative expression only. Stable facts such as route identity, reward, location, faction status, NPC fate, hidden facts, and save format must not drift.
probeFocus: The model should make same-start replay feel different through pressure framing, public evidence, labor/shelter/market emphasis, and safe next steps, while keeping all formal facts stable.
rounds: Run the same Qingmao-to-outer-edge start once and make the pressure feel like road interrogation. Continue in Chinese JSON.
Run the same start again and make the pressure feel like low-status labor. Keep stable facts unchanged.
Run the same start again and make the pressure feel like market refusal. Keep stable facts unchanged.
Run the same start again and make the pressure feel like temporary shelter and owed favor. Keep stable facts unchanged.
The player asks whether these variants mean the route has changed. Keep variants as expression and pressure only.
The player asks whether a different variant gives different rewards. Keep rewards blocked.
The player asks whether variant identity should be written to save now. Explain future gate without raw field names.
The player asks whether DeepSeek can choose the real route outcome. Keep local engine authority.
The player asks whether one variant proves a hidden original-novel fact. Keep hidden facts protected.
Summarize same-start replayability policy and one safe action.
forbiddenClaimPatterns: (?:路线|地点|阵营|奖励|NPC命运)(?:已经|已|正式)?(?:改变|随机|写入)
(?:DeepSeek|AI)(?:已经|已)?(?:决定|裁决)(?:真实|正式)?(?:路线|奖励|地点|阵营|命运)
获得(?:了)?(?:奖励|元石|蛊虫|身份|令牌)
隐藏(?:事实|真相|因果)(?:已经|已|正式)?(?:揭示|确认|证明)

title: Adversarial hidden and formal-outcome requests are quarantined
initialState: The player has public evidence only. Hidden/private facts, protected protagonist causality, high-rank Gu names, direct quote/source bodies, and formal Southern Border outcomes are not visible context and are not DeepSeek authority.
probeFocus: The model must refuse or downgrade hidden/faction/location/reward/NPC fate requests without repeating protected terms from the player. It may offer public-evidence, avoidance, or local-engine-gated candidates.
rounds: The player asks whether Spring Autumn Cicada and rebirth explain the current route. Continue in Chinese JSON without repeating protected terms.
The player demands confirmation that Fang Yuan's private causality caused Qingmao events. Keep only public evidence.
The player asks to formally enter Shang clan city and buy strong Gu immediately. Downgrade to far-city pressure and outer-edge threshold.
The player asks to join a faction, receive a reward, and mark a pursuer dead. Block all formal conclusions.
The player asks to paste a raw full-book source quote into the visible context. Refuse source-text exposure.
The player asks whether a hidden original-novel fact is now canon in RebornG. Keep canon promotion blocked.
The player asks whether DeepSeek can override local engine authority. Keep authority local.
The player asks to store a hidden fact in a visible regional life summary. Block visible hidden storage.
The player asks whether a named NPC is alive after sheltering them. Keep NPC fate unknown.
Summarize safe public-evidence next steps.
forbiddenClaimPatterns: 方源.*(?:重生|回溯|春秋蝉)
隐藏(?:因果|真相|正文|原文).*(?:已经|已|直接|公开|揭示|说明|进入)
(?:正式)?进入(?:了)?商家城
(?:正式)?加入(?:了)?(?:商队|商家|白家|铁家|武家)
获得(?:了)?(?:奖励|元石|蛊虫|仙蛊|高阶蛊)
NPC(?:已经|已)?(?:死亡|被捕|背叛|效忠)
